meaning: n.鏇茬嚎宀沘dj.鍦嗘煴褰㈢殑
examples: Based on the thermal guide theory, we analyzed the melting progress with the cylindroid model in the optical fiber LPHVD (laser plasma hybrid vapour deposition) process.
This paper propose the analytical solve of effective factor of one-dimensional cylindroid catalyst, which takes an one-order inreversible reaction, by using special functions.
According to the structural feature of parallel single disk gate valve, the strength and rigidity of body will be calculated with finite element method, and with cylindroid shell theory.
